name: opstruth-monorepo
description: Monorepo for opstruth CLI and public website.

scripts.build:bun: cd website && bun install && bun run build && cd .. && node scripts/sync-website-dist.js
scripts.build:npm: cd website && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node scripts/sync-website-dist.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint:cli && npm run lint:website
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.preview:cloudflare: npm run build:website && npx wrangler dev
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build:website && npx wrangler deploy
